title: Did Elves Visit in 1906?

scenes.text: An encounter with mystical beings left locals questioning reality.
This curious event took place near Skælskør, a quaint town in Denmark.
In 1906, a group of children reported seeing elves at a burial site, captivating the community.
The tale is documented in folklore and historical records, still debated by scholars.
Eyewitness testimony remains a profound mystery, with skeptics and believers debating.
scenes.label: UNEXPLAINED ENCOUNTER

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 Skælskør, Denmark - 1906. A group of children claimed to see elves near a burial mound, leaving behind a tale of intrigue and debate. Follow for daily mysteries!
